page_title: Visitor record: After you apply - Canada.ca

sections.heading: If your application is approved
items: You should get your visitor record in the mail within 6 weeks of getting your decision letter. If you don’t, contact us .

sections.heading: If your status expires
items: If you apply to extend your stay in Canada before the date by which you’re supposed to leave , you can legally stay in Canada until a decision is made on your application. In this situation, you have maintained your status .
